case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND THROUGH VS. ENGINEER. KELLY DBA GUY'S SERVICE GAS & DIESEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. AVNTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
